directive:
Assemble the pull request description from batch results, update the PR, and mark it ready for review.

1. Run: koto context get work-on-plan batch_final_view
2. For each child in batch_final_view include: name, outcome, reason (if failed or skipped), reason_source, skipped_because_chain (if skipped)
3. Update the PR description with gh pr edit
4. Mark ready for review: gh pr ready <pr-number>
5. Submit finalization_status: updated with pr_url, or finalization_status: update_failed if either step fails
